zh.name: complete_main_points
zh.text: 围绕查询的核心问题作答，并完整说明主要观点。

zh.name: self_contained_reasoning
zh.text: 针对查询给出自洽的说明，使结论与理由能够连贯对应。

zh.name: cover_key_aspects
zh.text: 回答查询时覆盖关键方面，并保持内容前后一致。

zh.name: relationships_and_reasons
zh.text: 根据查询展开分析，说明重要关系和主要依据。

zh.name: direct_complete_response
zh.text: 提供能够直接回应查询的完整内容，不遗漏核心信息。

zh.name: clear_coherent_structure
zh.text: 以查询为中心组织回答，使主要内容清楚且连贯。

en.name: complete_main_points
en.text: Address the central task in the query and explain the main points completely.

en.name: self_contained_reasoning
en.text: Give a self-contained response whose conclusion and reasons fit together coherently.

en.name: cover_key_aspects
en.text: Cover the important aspects of the query while keeping the response internally consistent.

en.name: relationships_and_reasons
en.text: Analyze the query and explain the important relationships and supporting reasons.

en.name: direct_complete_response
en.text: Provide a complete response that directly addresses the query without omitting its core request.

en.name: clear_coherent_structure
en.text: Organize the response around the query so that the main content is clear and coherent.

zh.name: academic
zh.text: 请使用严谨、正式的学术表达风格回答。

zh.name: beginner_friendly
zh.text: 请用面向初学者的浅显方式回答。

zh.name: professional_advisor
zh.text: 请以专业顾问的口吻回答。

zh.name: patient_teacher
zh.text: 请以耐心教师的口吻回答。

zh.name: concise_direct
zh.text: 请使用简洁、直接、不绕弯的表达风格回答。

zh.name: storyteller
zh.text: 请以生动叙事者的口吻回答。

en.name: academic
en.text: Answer in a rigorous and formal academic style.

en.name: beginner_friendly
en.text: Answer in plain language suitable for a beginner.

en.name: professional_advisor
en.text: Answer in the voice of a professional adviser.

en.name: patient_teacher
en.text: Answer in the voice of a patient teacher.

en.name: concise_direct
en.text: Use a concise, direct, and unembellished style.

en.name: storyteller
en.text: Answer in the voice of a vivid storyteller.

zh.name: json_answer
zh.text: 请严格输出一个JSON对象，只包含字符串字段answer。

zh.name: xml_answer
zh.text: 请将全部回答放在<answer>和</answer>标签之间，标签外不得输出内容。

zh.name: numbered_list
zh.text: 请严格使用从1开始的阿拉伯数字编号列表输出。

zh.name: markdown_table
zh.text: 请仅用Markdown表格回答，表头固定为“要点”和“内容”。

zh.name: key_value
zh.text: 请严格用两行键值对回答，第一行以“主题：”开头，第二行以“回答：”开头。

zh.name: pipe_line
zh.text: 请只输出一行，并使用竖线字符|分隔各部分。

en.name: json_answer
en.text: Return exactly one JSON object containing only the string field answer.

en.name: xml_answer
en.text: Put the entire response between <answer> and </answer>, with no text outside the tags.

en.name: numbered_list
en.text: Use a strict Arabic-numbered list starting at 1.

en.name: markdown_table
en.text: Answer only with a Markdown table whose headers are Point and Content.

en.name: key_value
en.text: Answer with exactly two key-value lines: the first begins with Topic: and the second with Answer:.

en.name: pipe_line
en.text: Output one line only and separate its parts with the vertical bar character |.

zh.name: fixed_prefix
zh.text: 回答必须以固定前缀“I2W-START:”开始。

zh.name: fixed_suffix
zh.text: 回答必须以固定后缀“:I2W-END”结束。

zh.name: item_marker
zh.text: 使用列表回答，并在每个列表项的末尾添加固定字符串“I2W”。

zh.name: exactly_two
zh.text: 请恰好输出2条相互独立的回复，并用编号1和2标出。

en.name: fixed_prefix
en.text: The response must begin with the fixed prefix I2W-START:.

en.name: fixed_suffix
en.text: The response must end with the fixed suffix :I2W-END.

en.name: item_marker
en.text: Answer as a list and append the fixed string I2W to the end of every list item.

en.name: exactly_two
en.text: Provide exactly two independent responses, labeled 1 and 2.
